title: PayPal names Expedia executive its next chief product officer
text: PayPal Holdings Inc. PYPL, +1.26% said Thursday that it has tapped John Kim, an Expedia Group Inc. EXPE, +0.77% veteran, to be its next chief product officer. Kim, who spent a decade with the online-travel company, most recently as the president of Expedia Marketplace, will take over the PayPal position Sept.

title: PayPal Appoints John Kim as Chief Product Officer
text: Former President of Expedia Marketplace Brings Extensive Product Management and Technical Experience to PayPal SAN JOSE, Calif. , Sept. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) today announced that John Kim will join the company as Executive Vice President (EVP), Chief Product Officer (CPO), effective September 26, 2022.
